title: EIGRP ACL Düzeltme (R3, ACL 151) + CoPP: SSH /24, 9000 bps (R2)
guidelines: Refer to the Tasks tab to view the tasks for this lab item.
Refer to the Topology tab to access the device console(s) and perform the tasks.
Console access is available for all required devices.
All necessary preconfigurations have been applied.
Do not change the enable password or hostname for any device.
Save your configurations to NVRAM before moving to the next item.
tasks: EIGRP is preconfigured on all routers. Configure R2 and R3 to complete these tasks.

Task 1: Modify the existing ACL on R3 so that EIGRP routes are received from R1 and R2. (1) The modification should only allow EIGRP routes to pass. (2) Do not remove any configuration from R3 to achieve this task.
Task 2: Configure CoPP on R2 to achieve these results: (1) Permit SSH traffic from 192.168.201.0/24. (2) Limit traffic to 9,000 bps. (3) Discard additional packets.
hints: R3'te 'show access-lists' ile ACL numarasını doğrula (151 bekleniyor); EIGRP için '5 permit eigrp any any' (deny'den önce sıra numarası).
9,000 bps + fazlasını at: 'police 9000 conform-action transmit exceed-action drop'; control-plane altında 'service-policy input COPP'.
answer_key_raw:
R3:
R3> enable
R3# configure terminal
R3(config)# ip access-list extended 151
R3(config-ext-nacl)# 5 permit eigrp any any
R3(config-ext-nacl)# end
R3# write

R2:
R2> enable
R2# configure terminal
R2(config)# ip access-list extended SSH
R2(config-ext-nacl)# permit tcp 192.168.201.0 0.0.0.255 any eq 22
R2(config-ext-nacl)# exit
R2(config)# class-map match-any SSH
R2(config-cmap)# match access-group name SSH
R2(config-cmap)# exit
R2(config)# policy-map COPP
R2(config-pmap)# class SSH
R2(config-pmap-c)# police 9000 conform-action transmit exceed-action drop
R2(config-pmap-c)# control-plane
R2(config-cp)# service-policy input COPP
R2(config-cp)# end
R2# write
explanation: Item 27 ile aynı EIGRP+SSH senaryosu ama roller değişik: ACL R3'te (151, '5 permit eigrp any any' deny'den önce), CoPP R2'de. R2'de CoPP zinciri 192.168.201.0/24 kaynaklı SSH (TCP 22) trafiğini 9000 bps ile sınırlar, fazlasını atar; control-plane'e 'service-policy input COPP' ile uygulanır.
